name: Sparkle
description: Software update framework for macOS apps — the de facto standard Cocoa updater used by thousands of Mac apps.

seo.title: Sparkle — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Sparkle: Software update framework for macOS apps — the de facto standard Cocoa updater used by thousands of Mac apps.

when_to_use: In-app auto-update for macOS desktop applications
EDDSonoma-signed update delivery for macOS apps
Delta updates reducing download size for frequent releases
Update channel management for beta and stable tracks

pros: De facto auto-updater for Mac apps for 15+ years
Solid code-sign verification and security story
cons: Mac-only, nothing for Windows or Linux
XPC and sandbox integration can be fiddly
review.verdict: If you ship a Mac app, you use Sparkle — no credible alternative for direct-distribution apps.
review.best_for: Direct-download macOS apps needing a rock-solid, secure auto-updater.
review.not_for: Mac App Store apps or cross-platform teams wanting one updater everywhere.
